summary: Set 069 Session 6 of 6 (FINAL) -- synthesis + docs + ai_router 0.23.0 release + dogfood + set close. Ran on claude-opus-4-8 high (operator launch; routed rec was sonnet-4-6/medium, with an orchestrator caveat that release-correctness favors at-least-medium capability). NO new product code this session (the capability code shipped + was verified in S1-S5); the only code change is the version bump 0.22.1->0.23.0 plus a dogfood-driven fix (below). DELIVERED: (1) SYNTHESIS DOCS -- docs/verification-surface-strategy.md gained section 6 'Set 069 -- the execution-backed evidence layer' (the as-built capability ladder, the GREEN Podman spike outcome 6/6 podman 4.9.3, and how the S5 ratchet/replacement-gate instrument the section-5 RETIRE-reopen question); ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md gained the S5 ratchet + replacement-gate section; the proposal status flipped to BUILT. (2) RELEASE -- ai_router 0.22.1->0.23.0 (MINOR; all additive/back-compat) in __init__.py + pyproject.toml (packaging-hygiene version-consistency test green); CHANGELOG 0.23.0 entry (Added for S1-S5 + a Fixed subsection for the S6 dogfood catches). PyPI publish is operator-driven: operator pushes tag v0.23.0 on the final pushed master SHA after Test is GREEN on that exact SHA (Set 068 lesson: verify tag commit == fixed SHA; immutable-PyPI means a post-tag fix needs a new patch). Record the publish run id post-release. NO Marketplace/extension change (spec non-goal: no UI this whole set). (3) change-log.md (all six sessions). VERIFICATION (cross-provider, gpt-5-4, gated->REQUIRED -- routed_gate trips on blast-radius+multi-module+breadth[7 files]+build-config[pyproject.toml]; up-front conventions block per L-064-10): R1 ISSUES_FOUND with TWO Minor doc-accuracy defects -- (a) the S5 ratchet prose said 'six' mechanical gates but named only five (the floor_ratchet.py code DOCSTRING itself miscounted -- _eval_mechanical_gates appends exactly FIVE: fails-on-old, passes-on-fixed, drives-public-contract, flake-check, has-owner; admission = five gates AND human sign-off); (b) two summaries used a stale '0.21.x/0.22.x' baseline. BOTH FIXED across every echo (L-065-1): six->five in the two floor_ratchet docstrings + test comments + CHANGELOG + pull-verifier.md + strategy doc + change-log.md; '0.21.x/0.22.x loop'->'Set 067/068 loop' in CHANGELOG + change-log.md. R2 VERIFIED (wording-only re-verify, max_tier pinned per L-064-7). DOGFOOD (the headline; pathAwareCritique: required is satisfied): the now-execution-capable producer ran over this set's OWN diff (default openai+google over the natural full repo sandbox per L-067-1; get_diff base=b5ec2d8 + probe-template lane + a trusted run_test command). google=VERIFIED; openai/gpt-5.4 caught ONE Major + ONE Minor the S5 per-session routed verification had MISSED (the path-aware-dogfood-beats-per-session pattern of Sets 067/068, and the L-066-1 'dogfood the gate by arming the set under its own policy' lesson): MAJOR -- check_floor_ratchet_coverage matched coverage on a finding's free-text DESCRIPTION as well as the stable '<provider>:<index>' ref, so one description-keyed candidate could satisfy coverage for several distinct reproduced defects (under-enforcing the mandatory rule); FIX removed the description fallback (stable-ref-only match; the canonical build_candidate_from_finding always records the stable ref) + a regression test (test_description_keyed_candidate_does_not_cover). MINOR -- the replacement-scoreboard schema described falseReproduced as 'wrongly tagged REPRODUCED without a valid replay', implying it derives from replayed==false, but score_benchmark (correctly) records it as an INDEPENDENT integrity flag (a replay can run yet validate the wrong entrypoint -- a meta-oracle failure); FIX clarified the schema prose, code unchanged. Both fixed pre-release; the patch was routed-re-verified (gpt-5-4) VERIFIED; the dogfood path-aware-critique.json is preserved as the record of what the new lanes caught. CONTRACT-GATE DOGFOOD (contractGate: advisory, 'light'): authored contract-manifest.json (5 defect classes -- 4 probeable S1/S5 properties + 1 non-probeable meta-oracle residual) and ran the Set-068 floor over this set's own probes via the run_test cage: contract floor PASSED (every probeable class covered) and contract-floor-result.json written. PROCESS NOTE (not blocking): unlike pathAwareCritique (recorded in activity-log at S1 set start), the contractGate seed from the spec was NEVER recorded as a durable activity-log entry, so the close-out contract gate is a no-op (treated as 'none') -- contractGate is advisory so it never blocks; candidate future fix = have start_session record the contractGate seed the same way it records pathAwareCritique. SUITE: full ai_router GREEN 1954 passed / 5 skipped (baseline 1953/5 + 1 new regression; the 5 skips are the S4 real-podman regressions, Windows-host skip by design). Metered spend this session: verification R1 $0.1868 + R2 $0.0399 + patch-verify $0.0380 + next-set-rec $0.0063 + the multi-provider dogfood producer (openai+google with execution lanes). SET 069 IS COMPLETE: the automated pull-critique produces execution-backed, replayable evidence, hardens the floor with reproduced probeable defects under a quality gate, and is measured against the manual run -- closing the gap the Set 068 0.22.x release exposed.

reason.specifics: Set 069 is COMPLETE; this points at the NEXT SET. Routed analysis (next-set-rec.md) recommends a real-workload PILOT set -- slug-style '070-pilot-harvester-telemetry' (2-4 sessions): (1) adopt ai_router 0.23.0 + author a domain probe-template library in a consumer repo (dabbler-access-harvester); (2) populate the replacement-gate pre-registered benchmark with 3-5 real holdout cases (recent misses); (3) run the execution-capable pull_critique + the replacement gate to produce the first REAL execution-backed telemetry -- the very data the Set 068 DEMOTE said RETIRE of the gated routed layer reopens on, and which has NOT yet been collected at scale. This beats building more ceiling/floor machinery: the Set 069 capabilities rest on small author-seeded instruments and need to make contact with reality. Alternative: a benchmark-population-only set if a full consumer pilot is too large. ORCHESTRATOR CAVEAT (a note on the routed output, not self-opinion): the routed analysis returned a STALE orchestrator model name ('claude-3-sonnet-20240229', effort '2') -- mapped to the closest current candidate, anthropic/sonnet-4-6 medium (good cost/capability for code-adoption + benchmark authoring); the operator may prefer claude-opus-4-8 for the analysis-heavy benchmark-population session or codex gpt-5.4 for a non-anthropic perspective. The operator picks. Note this pilot is a CONSUMER-repo effort -- it may live in dabbler-access-harvester rather than this canonical repo.
